title: 🇨🇿 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy...
title_en: 🇨🇿 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy...
description: 🇨🇿 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga held telephone talks with the Deputy Prime Minister, Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Czech Republic Petr Matsinka. Andriy Sybiga thanked the Czech Republic for its comprehensive support to Ukraine, in particular for the contribution of about 7 million US dollars to the PURL initiative, as well as for its continued support for Ukraine's accession to the EU, including the opening of negotiation clusters 1 and 6. Ukraine...

Andriy Sybiga thanked the Czech Republic for its comprehensive support to Ukraine, in particular for the contribution of about 7 million US dollars to the PURL initiative, as well as for its continued support for Ukraine's accession to the EU, including the opening of negotiation clusters 1 and 6. description_uk: 🇨🇿 Очільник МЗС України Андрій Сибіга провів телефонні переговори з віцепрем'єр-міністром, міністром закордонних справ Чехії Петром Мацінкою. Андрій Сибіга подякував Чехії за всебічну підтримку України, зокрема за внесок у розмірі близько 7 мільйонів доларів США до ініціативи PURL, а також за незмінну підтримку вступу України до ЄС, включно з відкриттям переговорних кластерів 1 і 6. Україна...

title: Kyiv: Attack attack on energy grid
title_en: Kyiv: Attack attack on energy grid
description: Fires break out in Russia's Lipetsk amid reported overnight attack. Fires broke out at industrial facilities in the Russian city of Lipetsk after reports of an overnight attack, with independent monitoring channels claiming the affected sites included a major steel plant and a power facility.

title: Kyiv: A decade after journalist Pavel Sheremet’s murder, justice remains...
title_en: Kyiv: A decade after journalist Pavel Sheremet’s murder, justice remains...
title_uk: Київ: через десять років після вбивства журналіста Павла Шеремета справедливість залишається...
description: A decade after journalist Pavel Sheremet’s murder, justice remains out of reach A decade after the murder of Belarusian-born journalist Pavel Sheremet in a car bombing in central Kyiv, justice remains elusive. The prosecution's case has unraveled under criticism, the three accused have been released, and proceedings are frozen until the end of Russia's full-scale war — when the trial is expected...
description_en: A decade after journalist Pavel Sheremet’s murder, justice remains out of reach A decade after the murder of Belarusian-born journalist Pavel Sheremet in a car bombing in central Kyiv, justice remains elusive. title: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir...
title_en: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir...
title_uk: 🇬🇧 Енді Бернем став новим головою уряду Його Величності Кейра...
description: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir Starmer officially left the post of Prime Minister of Great Britain 👥 King Charles III accepted Starmer's resignation and officially appointed Burnham as the head of the government. 💬 Earlier, Burnham stated that he would maintain the current level of support for Ukraine. He also stressed that Great Britain lives in an increasingly dangerous world
description_en: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir Starmer officially left the post of Prime Minister of Great Britain 👥 King Charles III accepted Starmer's resignation and officially appointed Burnham as the head of the government. 💬 Earlier, Burnham stated that he would maintain the current level of support for Ukraine. He also stressed that Great Britain lives in an increasingly dangerous world
description_uk: 🇬🇧 Новим головою уряду Його Величності став Енді Бернем, Кір Стармер офіційно залишив посаду прем’єр-міністра Великої Британії 👥 Король Чарльз III прийняв відставку Стармера та офіційно призначив Бернема главою уряду. 💬 Раніше Бернем заявив, що збереже нинішній рівень підтримки України. Він також наголошував, що Велика Британія живе у дедалі небезпечнішому світі

title: Kyiv: Missile attack on residential area
title_en: Kyiv: Missile attack on residential area
description: 🇻🇦 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Andriy Sybiga held a meeting with the Secretary of the Holy See for relations with states, Archbishop Paul Richard Gallagher, and thanked him for his visit to Ukraine at a time when Russia continues to increase terror against civilians. During his visit, Kyiv suffered another massive Russian missile and drone attack. No briefing can convey the reality of this war...
description_en: 🇻🇦 The head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Andriy Sybiga held a meeting with the Secretary of the Holy See for relations with states, Archbishop Paul Richard Gallagher, and thanked him for his visit to Ukraine at a time when Russia continues to increase terror against civilians. During his visit, Kyiv suffered another massive Russian missile and drone attack. No briefing can convey the reality of this war...
description_uk: 🇻🇦 Очільник МЗС Андрій Сибіга провів зустріч з Секретарем Святого Престолу з питань відносин з державами, Архієпископом Полом Річардом Галагером, та подякував йому за візит до України в той час, коли Росія продовжує посилювати терор проти цивільних громадян. Під час його візиту Київ зазнав чергової масованої російської ракетно-дронової атаки. Жоден брифінг не здатен передати реальність цієї війни...
